encounter.type: telephone encounter — social care referral completion
encounter.location: Rose City Community Services, 6530 SE 82nd Avenue, Portland, OR 97266

document_references.description: Documents telephone contact by Janet Flores confirming Maria Chen's SNAP application approval ($430/month for household of three, effective April 15, 2026). Notes client confirmed completion of two weekly food pantry pickups and use of one transit voucher for a medical appointment. All service milestones marked complete (food pantry enrollment active, SNAP approved and active, transit vouchers distributed and in use). Referral case closed by Robert Tran. Client reports no additional unmet social needs and expressed satisfaction with services. Maria provided with CBO direct contact information for future needs.
